heading: Liability
label: 1421e Liability

children.text: in accordance with the agreement; and

children.label: A
children.text: the contingency plan issued under ;section 1421c(b) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the instructions of an Onsite Coordinator designated under ; orsection 1421c(c) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: the best professional judgment of an Onsite Coordinator, in the case of any matter that is not covered by the contingency plan.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: b Limitation
children.text: Subsection (a) does not apply to actions of a person described in that subsection that are grossly negligent or that constitute willful misconduct.
